# AI Trade Agent

> Free, open-source visual MetaTrader 5 trading strategy builder with a drag-and-drop node editor. Desktop app for live MT5 trading; browser site is a promotional web demo (interactive editor on desktop only).

AI Trade Agent (also known as ComfyTrade) lets traders design automated forex strategies without coding. Connect triggers, indicators, logic gates, and trade nodes on a canvas, then run against MT5 or the built-in simulator. MIT licensed.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/tomtomtong/comfyTrade-node-editor-for-MT5): Source code, issues, discussions, and contributions
- [Download releases](https://github.com/tomtomtong/comfyTrade-node-editor-for-MT5/releases): Windows, macOS, and Linux desktop builds
- [README documentation](https://github.com/tomtomtong/comfyTrade-node-editor-for-MT5#readme): Install, configure API keys, and run the desktop app

## Web demo

- [Live web demo](https://ai-trade-agent.com/): Promo page with tutorial video and CTAs; node editor UI hidden on mobile (viewport ≤768px)
- [Tutorial video](https://youtu.be/M3GVP0L68rY): Walkthrough for building AI trading agents with the node editor
- [OpenAPI specification](https://ai-trade-agent.com/openapi.yaml): REST API for the simulated demo (account, orders, market data)

## Features (desktop)

- [Node editor](https://github.com/tomtomtong/comfyTrade-node-editor-for-MT5#readme): Visual strategy builder with triggers, MA, RSI, logic gates, open/close/modify position nodes
- Real MT5 integration via Python bridge, historical backtesting, paper trading simulator, risk limits, Twilio SMS/WhatsApp alerts, and a plugin system for custom nodes

## Community and support

- [Discord community](https://discord.com/invite/4EWYahsGdJ): Help, share strategies, connect with traders
- [LinkedIn — Tom Tong](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom-tong/): Updates and trading-tech insights
- [Email support](mailto:tomtomtongtong@gmail.com): tomtomtongtong@gmail.com

## Optional

- [AI plugin manifest](https://ai-trade-agent.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json): Discovery metadata for AI assistants
- [Sitemap](https://ai-trade-agent.com/sitemap.xml): Indexable URLs for the web demo site
- [Robots.txt](https://ai-trade-agent.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy (allows major search and AI crawlers)
